title: Open World Inventory
description: Yet another backpacks mod to store your items
body:
This mod adds a total of 16 storage items (4 bundles and 12 backpacks) each with more slots, 12 storage crates which also have increasingly more slots, as well as 9 advancements. All the advancements unlock recipes of the next levels of the backpacks/crates. **Do NOT upgrade the backpacks with stuff inside**, it will get rid of your items. No additional mods are required. Extra features like upgrades or more backpacks/crates, GUI/item sprite changes and QOL features will be added in future versions.\
Current goals:\
More updates for Neoforge\
Support for Fabric
